title: Manmathane Lyrics Manmathan
stanzas:
Manmathane nee kalaignan thaan
Manmathane nee kavignan thaan
Manmathane nee kadhalan thaan
Manmathane nee kavalan thaan

ennai unakkulle tholaithaen
yeno theriyala
unnai kanda nodi yeno
innum nagarala.
undhan rasigai naanum
unakken puriyavillai.

Manmathane nee kalaignan thaan
Manmathane nee kavignan thaan
Manmathane nee kadhalan thaan
Manmathane nee kavalan thaan

unnai naan paartha pin
aangal vargathai naanum
mathiththaen.

endhan nenjil oonjal katti
aadikonde irukkiraai
enakkul pugunthu
engo neeyum
oadi konde irukkiraai

azhagaai naanum maarugiren
arivaai naanum pesugiren
sugamaai naanum malarugiren
unakkethum therigirathaa.

Manmathane unnai paarkiren
Manmathane unnai rasikkiren.
Manmathane unnai rusikkiren
Manmathane unnai vasikkiren.

adimai saasanam ezhuthi
tharugiren ennai yetrukollu.
aayul varaiyil unnudan
iruppen anbaai paarthukollu.(2)
tamilStanzas:
மன்மதனே நீ கலைஞன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ கவிஞன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ காதலன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ காவலன் தான்

என்னை உனக்குள்ளே தொலைத்தேன்
ஏனோ தெரியல
உன்னை கண்ட நொடி ஏனோ
இன்னும் நகரல.
உந்தன் ரசிகை நானும்
உனக்கேன் புரியவில்லை.

மன்மதனே நீ கலைஞன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ கவிஞன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ காதலன் தான்
மன்மதனே நீ காவலன் தான்

உன்னை நான் பார்த்த பின்
ஆண்கள் வர்கத்தை
நானும் மதித்தான்.

எந்தன் நெஞ்சில்
ஊஞ்சல் கட்டி
ஆடிக்கொண்டே இருக்கிறாய்
எனக்குள் புகுந்து
எங்கோ நீயும்
ஓடி கொண்டே இருக்கிறாய்

அழகாய் நானும் மாறுகிறேன்
அறிவாய் நானும் பேசுகிறேன்
சுகமாய் நானும் மலருகிறேன்
உனக்கேதும் தெரிகிறதா.

மன்மதனே உன்னை பார்க்கிறேன்
மன்மதனே உன்னை ரசிக்கிறேன்.
மன்மதனே உன்னை ருசிக்கிறேன்
மன்மதனே உன்னில் வசிக்கிறேன்.

உன்னை முழுதாக நானும்
மெண்டு  மிழுங்கவோ .
உந்தன் முன்னாடி மட்டும்
வெட்கம்  வரட்டுமோ .

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Manmathane?

The song Manmathane expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Manmadhan?

In Manmadhan, this song captures the protagonist's feelings as he navigates his romantic relationships, highlighting his emotional struggles.

Who is the singer and music director of Manmathane?

The song is sung by Sadhana Sargam and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Manmathane released?

Manmathane was released on November 12, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Manmathane, the protagonist expresses his deep affection and emotional struggles through heartfelt lyrics. The song beautifully captures the essence of romantic longing, making it a perfect fit for moments of love and reflection. With Sadhana Sargam's soulful rendition and Yuvan's captivating music, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and yearning. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love, making it a cherished classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Manmathane from the movie Manmadhan is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully showcases Sadhana Sargam's enchanting vocals paired with Yuvan's mesmerizing composition. This song encapsulates the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless favorite among fans. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Oh Manmathan, you are an artist. Oh Manmathan, you are a poet. Oh Manmathan, you are a lover. Oh Manmathan, you are a protector.
I feel like I have lost myself in you. I don't know why, but seeing you makes me feel different. I can't understand your fans either.
I have crossed many obstacles to come here, but I don't like anyone else.
For twenty years, no one has been able to confuse me like you do.
Oh Manmathan, you are an artist. Oh Manmathan, you are a poet. Oh Manmathan, you are a lover. Oh Manmathan, you are a protector.
I have lived my life as a woman, experiencing its fruits.
After seeing you, I have also changed my ways.
In my heart, you are swinging and staying. You have entered me and are running around.
I have also become beautiful, I am speaking wisely, and I have also blossomed. Do you understand this?
If I look once, it feels like many times. What kind of sweetness is this?
My friend, if I am a lover, is that a part of history?
Oh Manmathan, I see you. Oh Manmathan, I enjoy you. Oh Manmathan, I get angry with you. Oh Manmathan, I want you.
Will I be able to completely forget you? Will you not let go of your past?
Will you write my name on my bed?
I will write a decree of servitude, take me as your own. I will stay with you until the end of my life, please take care of me.
